Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: black silver-inlaid cane made of ebony wood, bronze revolver with wooden grip in underarm holster
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned taking off his formal suit and wearing his usual brownish-yellow coat. Bought a black silver-inlaid cane made of ebony wood. Carries a bronze revolver in an underarm holster.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: suit of formal clothing, silk hat, and a handkerchief

Zhou Mingrui.primary_clothing: everyday wear: brownish-yellow coat with matching felt hat with rounded edge; formal wear: black vest with matching suit, tight trousers, and halved top hat
Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.distinguishing_features: Experiences splitting headaches when his connection to the crimson stars and grayish-white fog begins to falter; connection to the foggy realm is tied to his concentration and mental state
Zhou Mingrui.accessories: pocket watch kept on study desk; apartment study with desk and chair
Zhou Mingrui.role: Transmigrated protagonist; has fully accepted the identity of Klein Moretti as of this chapter; chairs the newly formed Tarot Club as The Fool
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: End of chapter: 'From this moment forth, I'm Klein.' He also picks up a pocket watch to measure elapsed time, confirming the accessory. His headache is directly linked to the weakening of his mystical connection.
Zhou Mingrui.era_clothing_lock: brownish-yellow wool coat with matching rounded-brim felt hat for daily errands; black vest and matching black suit with tight trousers and a vertically halved top hat for formal occasions — both fully Victorian in silhouette

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage girl, pale thin face with lustrous skin and sharp brown eyes, black hair reaching to the vest, wearing a tattered inherited veil cap, plain Victorian working-class dress with a self-sewn book bag over her shoulder
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Gifted mechanical aptitude — repaired a malfunctioning pocket watch that professional watchsmiths could not fully fix; deeply practical and emotionally reserved
Melissa Moretti.accessories: veil hat (removes it upon returning home from school), handbag
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Described as having soft, black hair upon entering the room.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Text states he 'worked for several years' and 'using the convenience of working at an import and export company, he purchased a brand new gas lamp which was nearly at cost price'

Wendy Smyrin.age_range: seventies (explicitly stated as seventy-plus years old)
Wendy Smyrin.hair_style: presumably tied back, full head of grayish-white hair
Wendy Smyrin.primary_clothing: modest Victorian dress, perhaps with an apron
Wendy Smyrin.face_description: elderly woman in her seventies with a habitually warm, genial smile; appears lively and humorous despite her age
Wendy Smyrin.visual_anchor: seventy-plus female, completely grayish-white hair, kind wrinkled face with a genial smile, wearing a modest Victorian dress
Wendy Smyrin.distinguishing_features: always wears a genial smile; has sold bread from the same bakery since Klein's earliest memories; known and friendly with the Moretti family
Wendy Smyrin.role: supporting — owner of Smyrin Bakery on the street near Iron Cross Street, sells bread and pastries
Wendy Smyrin.source_notes: Text explicitly states 'seventy-plus year old granny named Wendy Smyrin. Her hair was completely grayish-white and she always wore a genial smile.'

Mr. Franky.face_description: short and thin gentleman with an excitable, loud demeanor that contrasts his otherwise gentlemanly appearance
Mr. Franky.visual_anchor: short thin pale male landlord in a black Victorian suit with waistcoat and top hat, always gripping a walking stick ready to strike, with an agitated expression and loud voice
Mr. Franky.source_notes: Text explicitly states: 'short and thin gentleman who wore a top hat, a vest, and a black suit' and 'flailing his walking stick and striking the bathroom's door'
Mr. Franky.era_clothing_lock: black suit with waistcoat (vest), black top hat, carries a walking stick
Mr. Franky.unique_identifier: always carries a walking stick which he flails when agitated; short and thin frame with top hat that makes him look taller

Selena.primary_clothing: Victorian modest day dress with simple lace collar
Selena.face_description: Youthful, cheerful face with bright, deep brown eyes.
Selena.visual_anchor: Teenage female, almost 16, wine-red hair, deep brown eyes, cheerful expression, wearing a modest Victorian day dress.
Selena.color_palette: wine-red, deep brown, cream, pastel blue
Selena.source_notes: Described in Klein's thoughts when Melissa mentions her.

Chris.face_description: Serious, professional demeanor with standard Victorian grooming.
Chris.visual_anchor: Late 20s male lawyer, neat brown hair, wearing a professional dark Victorian suit.
Chris.source_notes: Only his profession (lawyer) and relationship (Selena's brother) are mentioned. Visuals guessed based on profession and era.

Harvin Stone.face_description: Stern face framed by a black beard.
Harvin Stone.visual_anchor: Middle-aged male instructor, black beard, wearing a white shirt and black tuxedo.
Harvin Stone.source_notes: Physical description when Klein meets him in the university office.

Senior Associate Professor Cohen.face_description: deep, blue eyes sunk deep into his face, few wrinkles
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.visual_anchor: late 50s male, pale skin, grey thinning hair, wearing spectacles and a formal grey academic gown
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.accessories: black cane, pocket watch on a golden chain
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.source_notes: Physical description when Klein encounters him outside the office.

Azik.primary_clothing: Classic academic suit, chocolate brown wool, white shirt, black tie
Azik.face_description: soft facial features, weary eyes, black mole beneath his right ear
Azik.visual_anchor: mid-40s male, medium skin tone, short black hair, brown eyes, wearing a chocolate brown academic suit with a calm expression
Azik.source_notes: Detailed physical description provided when he is standing next to Cohen.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: acquired a notebook from the Fourth Epoch; generous personality; recruited Klein and Naya to help decode it
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.faction: son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: 'He was the son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom' stated explicitly; his role in obtaining the Fourth Epoch notebook confirmed

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.
